subcodes.first_line: O thou leaf stirred by the gentle breeze of the Love of God! Thank thou God who hath caused thee to grow upon the Lofty Tree
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الورقهه المتحرکته من نسائم محبته الله اشکری الله بما انبتک من الشجره
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
